items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access | APTA
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that the demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, highlighting challenges in workforce, access, and awareness.
items.curatedReason: APTA 报告指出美国盆底物理治疗需求大于可及性，这直接影响你的执业环境。你需要关注人才短缺和公众认知不足，并思考如何通过实践转型、倡导扩大执业范围来应对这一挑战。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告发现美国盆底物理治疗需求超出可及性
items.summaryZh: APTA 最新报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》指出，美国盆底物理治疗需求远超可及性，凸显了劳动力、可及性和认知度方面的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA report highlights that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. outpaces access, directly impacting your practice environment. You need to address workforce shortages and public awareness, and consider how to respond to this challenge through practice transformation and advocating for expanded scope of practice.

items.title: Pioneering programme launched to test breakthrough spinal treatment in UK rehab centres - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: The UK has launched a pioneering program to test the ARC-EX system, the first dedicated treatment for paralysis approved by UK regulators, which combines targeted electrical spinal cord stimulation with rehabilitation exercises to restore strength and movement in spinal cord injury patients.
items.curatedReason: 英国率先推出开创性脊髓治疗 ARC-EX 系统，结合靶向电刺激和康复运动，帮助脊髓损伤患者恢复力量和运动。这对你来说是重大进展，预示着新的辅助技术将进入临床，可提升脊髓损伤康复的疗效。
items.titleZh: 英国康复中心推出开创性项目，测试突破性脊髓治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 英国推出一项开创性项目，旨在测试 ARC-EX 系统——英国监管机构批准的首个针对瘫痪的专用治疗方案。该系统结合了靶向电脊髓刺激与康复运动，以帮助脊髓损伤患者恢复力量和运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: The UK has launched the groundbreaking ARC-EX system for spinal treatment, combining targeted electrical stimulation with rehabilitation exercises to help spinal cord injury patients regain strength and movement. This is a significant development for you, signaling new assistive technologies entering clinical practice that can enhance the efficacy of spinal cord injury rehabilitation.

items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis (n=NA) evaluated the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis, providing evidence for its efficacy in managing these conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析确证了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的益处，效应量显著。你可以更有信心地将产后运动纳入常规康复方案，并将其作为预防和治疗盆底健康问题的核心干预。
items.titleZh: 产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析（n=NA）评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响，为管理这些病症的有效性提供了证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Postpartum exercise is an effective and crucial intervention for preventing and treating pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. The evidence from this high-scoring systematic review is strong enough that you should consider postpartum exercise a core intervention in managing these conditions and actively recommend it to postpartum women.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供具体的效应量数据（如合并风险比或平均差异）以及纳入研究的异质性信息，限制了对其强度和适用性的精确判断。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide specific effect size data (e.g., pooled relative risks or mean differences) or heterogeneity information for the included studies, limiting a precise judgment of its strength and applicability.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial compared the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women, providing insights into interventions for age-related decline.
items.curatedReason: 对于老年女性患者，若你主要目标是改善身体机能，此 RCT 提示动态多组分运动的效果可能优于 OsteoStrong。在制定运动处方时，应优先考虑结合有氧、力量、平衡和柔韧性的综合性训练。
items.titleZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验：OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体机能影响的比较
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验比较了 OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体机能的影响，为年龄相关功能下降的干预措施提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: For older female patients, if your primary goal is to improve physical function, this RCT suggests that dynamic multicomponent exercise may be superior to OsteoStrong. When prescribing exercise, prioritize comprehensive training that combines aerobic, strength, balance, and flexibility components.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供详细的样本量、具体干预方案细节及关键效应量，限制了临床实践中的直接参考价值。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide detailed sample size, specific intervention protocols, or key effect sizes, limiting its direct reference value in clinical practice.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: A prospective study (n=NA) analyzed functional status after ventral hernia repair using TUG and 5xSTS tests preoperatively and at 4 weeks, 10 weeks, 6 months, and 1 year postoperatively, to evaluate longitudinal trends and improvement limits.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性研究表明，腹壁疝修补术后的功能恢复是一个长期过程，其改善趋势和极限需要持续关注。在术后康复中，应使用 TUG 和 5xSTS 等客观测试监测患者至少一年，并据此设定切合实际的长期目标。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修补术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善极限
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究（n=NA）分析了腹壁疝修补术后患者的功能状态，通过术前及术后 4 周、10 周、6 个月和 1 年的 TUG 和 5xSTS 测试，评估了其纵向趋势和改善极限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective study indicates that functional recovery after ventral hernia repair is a long-term process, with improvement trends and limits requiring continuous attention. In postoperative rehabilitation, you should use objective tests like TUG and 5xSTS to monitor patients for at least one year and set realistic long-term goals accordingly.
items.limitation: 该研究为一个试验的子研究，其入组标准和干预措施可能并非针对一般疝修补术患者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study is a sub-study of a trial, and its inclusion criteria and interventions may not apply to general hernia repair patients, limiting generalizability.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: The SKOAP Phase 2 protocol outlines a multicenter randomized pragmatic trial to compare intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain, addressing the limited head-to-head evidence for these procedural interventions.
items.curatedReason: SKOAP Phase 2 协议旨在比较膝关节骨关节炎疼痛的关节腔注射、膝神经阻滞和射频消融三种介入疗法。作为物理治疗师，了解这些介入治疗的比较效果对你进行联合治疗决策和转诊非常重要。
items.titleZh: 比较关节腔注射、膝神经阻滞和射频消融治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的多中心随机实用试验：SKOAP 二期方案
items.summaryZh: SKOAP 二期方案概述了一项多中心随机实用试验，旨在比较关节腔注射、膝神经阻滞和射频消融治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的效果，以解决这些介入治疗头对头比较证据有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: The SKOAP Phase 2 protocol aims to compare three interventional therapies—intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation—for knee osteoarthritis pain. As a physical therapist, understanding the comparative effects of these interventions is crucial for your collaborative treatment decisions and referrals.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布最终结果，因此无法提供临床实践改变的证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and final results have not yet been published, so it cannot provide evidence for clinical practice changes.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the efficacy and outcomes of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome, and bone marrow edema syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 对于多种骨病理学，包括骨折不愈合、骨坏死、骨应力损伤等，体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）的疗效是确凿的。若你的诊所具备 ESWT 设备，可以更有信心地将其应用于这些骨科病症的康复治疗中。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法在骨病管理中的应用：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征和骨髓水肿综合征等骨病理学管理中的疗效和结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For various bone pathologies, including non-union fractures, osteonecrosis, and bone stress injuries, extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) has confirmed efficacy. If your clinic is equipped with ESWT, you can confidently integrate it into the rehabilitation treatment for these orthopedic conditions.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供纳入研究的具体类型（如 RCT 数量）、质量评估结果或关键结局的效应量，限制了证据的强度和具体适用性。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide specific types of included studies (e.g., number of RCTs), quality assessment results, or effect sizes for key outcomes, limiting the strength and specific applicability of the evidence.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study (n=30) adapted the Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM) into Mexican Spanish (PRISM-MX) and showed preliminary internal consistency and convergent validity in adults with post-stroke spasticity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应性初步获验证，你可了解该工具在西班牙语人群中的适用性及信效度早期数据。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应性及初步心理测量学评估
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面预试验（n=30）将痉挛患者报告影响量表（PRISM）跨文化改编为墨西哥西班牙语（PRISM-MX），并在卒中后痉挛成人中显示出初步的内部一致性和收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PRISM-MX scale has been preliminarily validated for cross-cultural adaptation in Mexican post-stroke spasticity patients, offering insights into its applicability and early psychometric properties in a Spanish-speaking population.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面预试验性质，样本量较小（n=30），其信效度结果尚需大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional pilot study has a small sample size (n=30), and its psychometric results require validation in larger studies.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy (CP) accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence, highlighting barriers in low-resource settings.
items.curatedReason: 在喀麦隆脑瘫患儿队列中，早期物理治疗可显著改善依从性，但整体早期接受度和依从率仍偏低（均不足 40%）。这将提示你关注欠发达地区物理治疗可及性与依从性的结构性障碍。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫患儿早期物理治疗的可及性与依从性：一项医院研究
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆的一项横断面研究发现，仅 38.3% 的脑瘫（CP）患儿早期（5 个月前）接受物理治疗，且 38.3% 的患儿依从性良好，这突显了低资源环境下存在的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: In a cohort of children with cerebral palsy in Cameroon, early access to physiotherapy significantly improved adherence, though overall early access and adherence rates remain low (both below 40%). This highlights the need to address structural barriers to physiotherapy accessibility and adherence in underserved regions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性和前瞻性混合的横断面研究，难以确立因果关系，且数据主要依赖家长访谈和病历回顾。
items.limitationEn: This mixed retrospective and prospective cross-sectional study cannot establish causality, and data relied mainly on caregiver interviews and medical record reviews.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined how pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention (FOA) during telehealth instructions and feedback for clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, providing direct insights into clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性观察研究首次直接观察了儿童物理治疗师在远程医疗中使用关注焦点 (FOA) 的情况。对于你实践中的远程治疗沟通方式，可借鉴 FOA 的运用细节。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指导和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究检查了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中为神经发育障碍患者提供指导和反馈时，如何使用注意力焦点（FOA），提供了对临床实践的直接洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory observational study provides the first direct observation of pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) during telehealth. You can draw insights from the specific application of FOA in remote therapy communication for your own practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察设计，样本量小（6 位治疗师，12 位客户），且在特定地区进行，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This exploratory observational study has a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 clients) and was conducted in a specific region, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time, with high usability.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 是一种在院患者活动监测器，在健康老年人和住院患者中均显示出较高的准确性和用户友好性。作为临床医师，它可为你在住院患者康复中提供客观的活动量化工具。
items.titleZh: 用于急性期住院患者的活动监测器 PREEMPT 的验证
items.summaryZh: PREEMPT 活动监测器在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中得到验证，在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间和活动时间方面均表现出准确性，且用户友好度高。
items.curatedReasonEn: PREEMPT, an activity monitor for hospitalized patients, demonstrated high accuracy and user-friendliness in both healthy older adults and inpatients. As a clinician, you can use it to objectively quantify activity levels during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究的验证人群包含健康老年人和住院患者，但在住院患者组中未具体说明其疾病类型或活动受限程度，可能影响结果的泛化性。
items.limitationEn: The study validated the device in both healthy older adults and hospitalized patients, but did not specify the disease types or activity limitations in the inpatient group, which may affect generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded pragmatic RCT (n=NA) found that 8 weeks of physiotherapist-led exercise-based telerehabilitation for cancer survivors was safe but not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对癌症幸存者的 RCT 显示，为期 8 周的远程团体运动康复在改善生活质量方面，并不优于单次面对面评估和建议。这提示你远程康复的设计需要更深入的个性化和高强度干预，并非所有远程方案都天然优于有限的面诊。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面虽安全但不及单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法、务实型随机对照试验（n=NA）发现，针对癌症幸存者的为期 8 周的物理治疗师主导的运动远程康复是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面并未优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT for cancer survivors indicates that 8 weeks of remote group exercise telerehabilitation was not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving quality of life. This suggests that telerehabilitation designs may need more personalized and intensive interventions, as not all remote programs inherently outperform limited in-person consultations.
items.limitation: 本研究评估的是团体运动方案，而非个体化一对一远程治疗，结果外推到其他远程康复模式时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study evaluated a group exercise program, not individualized one-on-one remote therapy, so caution is needed when generalizing the results to other telerehabilitation models.

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial | medRxiv
items.summary: This clinical randomized controlled trial explored the feasibility and effects of treadmill training with visual feedback (VF) and VF plus rhythmic auditory cueing (VF+RAC) on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis (MS) during clinical rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 在 MS 患者的步态康复中，引入视觉反馈（VF）结合节律听觉提示（RAC）的跑步机训练是可行且有效的。你可以尝试将 VF+RAC 技术整合到你的 MS 步态训练方案中，以期改善患者的步态参数。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症患者跑步机训练联合节律听觉提示和/或视觉反馈的可行性及对步态参数的影响：一项临床随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项临床随机对照试验探讨了多发性硬化症（MS）患者在临床康复期间，跑步机训练结合视觉反馈（VF）以及 VF 加节律听觉提示（VF+RAC）的可行性及其对步态参数的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: For gait rehabilitation in MS patients, integrating treadmill training with visual feedback (VF) and rhythmic auditory cueing (RAC) is feasible and effective. You can consider incorporating VF+RAC technology into your MS gait training protocols to improve patients' gait parameters.
items.limitation: 作为临床随机对照试验，摘要未明确提及样本量和具体干预持续时间，且是预印本，完整同行评审结果尚待发布。
items.limitationEn: As a clinical randomized controlled trial, the abstract does not specify the sample size or duration of intervention, and being a preprint, full peer review results are pending.

items.title: Understanding the clinical profile of patients with frozen shoulder
items.summary: This longitudinal multicenter observational study (n=NA) characterized the clinical profile of patients with frozen shoulder, contributing to a better understanding of its progression and symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 冻结肩的临床特征复杂，不同阶段的进展和症状表现各异。这项观察性研究提供了更全面的疾病画像，提醒你在评估和诊断时要考虑其多变性，避免“一刀切”的治疗方法。
items.titleZh: 了解冻结肩患者的临床特征：一项纵向多中心观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项纵向多中心观察性研究（n=NA）描述了冻结肩患者的临床特征，有助于更好地理解其进展和症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Frozen shoulder presents with complex clinical features, with varying progression and symptoms across different stages. This observational study provides a more comprehensive disease profile, reminding you to consider its variability during assessment and diagnosis, avoiding a one-size-fits-all approach.
items.limitation: 作为一项观察性研究，它描述了冻结肩的临床特征，但不能建立因果关系，也无法评估特定干预措施的疗效。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it describes the clinical profile of frozen shoulder but cannot establish causality or evaluate the efficacy of specific interventions.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework designed for stroke evaluation and guidance, utilizing kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis, offering advancements in interpretable wearable sensing and human motion evaluation for training guidance.
items.curatedReason: ChainBMD 深度学习框架利用动力链图和时间分析进行卒中评估和指导，为卒中康复的客观评估和个性化训练提供了新思路。未来，你或能通过此类 AI 工具更精准地评估患者功能障碍并设计干预方案。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于动力链图和时间分析的深度学习卒中评估与指导框架
items.summaryZh: ChainBMD 是一个旨在用于卒中评估和指导的深度学习框架，它利用动力链图和时间分析，在可解释的穿戴式传感和人体运动评估方面取得了进展，以提供训练指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ChainBMD deep learning framework, which uses kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis for stroke evaluation and guidance, offers new approaches for objective assessment and personalized training in stroke rehabilitation. In the future, you may be able to use such AI tools to more accurately assess patient functional impairments and design intervention programs.
items.limitation: 作为技术框架研究，其临床验证结果（如对患者功能恢复的实际影响）仍需进一步的大规模临床试验来评估。
items.limitationEn: As a technical framework study, its clinical validation results (e.g., actual impact on patient functional recovery) still require further large-scale clinical trials.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This article reviews neurorobotics for neurorehabilitation, covering current clinical applications and identifying future research directions, highlighting the evolving role of robotics in neurological recovery.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复领域正迅速被神经机器人技术改变。你应关注这些前沿进展，因为机器人辅助治疗将越来越普遍。提前了解其临床应用和局限性，能帮助你更好地规划未来的执业方向和技术学习。
items.titleZh: 神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用及未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本文综述了神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用，并指明了未来的研究方向，突出了机器人技术在神经恢复中日益重要的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: The field of neurorehabilitation is rapidly being transformed by neurorobotics. You should pay attention to these cutting-edge advancements, as robot-assisted therapy will become increasingly prevalent. Understanding its clinical applications and limitations in advance will help you better plan your future practice and technical learning.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，其内容可能侧重于技术介绍和展望，而非提供新的临床实践证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, and its content may focus on technological introductions and outlooks rather than providing new clinical practice evidence.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This research suggests branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration by restoring the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis via microbial propionate, highlighting the gut-brain axis in disease pathology.
items.curatedReason: 这项基础研究揭示了支链氨基酸可能通过肠道微生物丙酸盐依赖的 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 信号通路来缓解帕金森病神经退行性病变。作为康复专业人士，这提示你营养干预和肠道健康可能在神经康复中扮演更重要的角色。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸盐依赖的 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 轴恢复缓解帕金森病神经退行性病变
items.summaryZh: 这项研究表明，支链氨基酸可能通过微生物丙酸盐依赖的 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 轴的恢复来缓解帕金森病的神经退行性病变，突出了肠脑轴在该病理学中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This basic research reveals that branched-chain amino acids may alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 signaling. As a rehabilitation professional, this suggests that nutritional interventions and gut health may play a more significant role in neurorehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为分子免疫学领域的基础研究，其结果尚不能直接应用于临床实践，需要进一步的转化研究和人体试验。
items.limitationEn: This is a basic research study in molecular immunology, and its results cannot be directly applied to clinical practice without further translational research and human trials.

items.title: Ethical Considerations Toward Harmonizing Human and Machine Agency in Embodied Neurotechnologies | Neuroethics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research explores ethical considerations for harmonizing human and machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies, such as medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, which enhance functional independence in neurological patients through AI-driven intent detection and action automation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇研究讨论了具身神经技术（如医用外骨骼、神经假肢）中人机智能伦理问题。作为神经康复专家，你需要关注这类技术的伦理框架，这不仅影响技术应用，也关乎患者自主权和治疗公平性。
items.titleZh: 具身神经技术中人机智能和谐化的伦理考量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了具身神经技术（如医用外骨骼和神经假肢）中人机智能和谐化的伦理考量，这些技术通过人工智能驱动的意图检测和行动自动化增强了神经患者的功能独立性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This research discusses the ethical considerations of human-machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies (e.g., medical exoskeletons, neuroprostheses). As a neurorehabilitation specialist, you need to pay attention to the ethical framework of these technologies, as it affects not only technological application but also patient autonomy and treatment equity.
items.limitation: 本研究为伦理学方面的述评，不涉及临床疗效或技术开发，其主要价值在于引发对未来技术应用的思考。
items.limitationEn: This study is an ethical commentary, not involving clinical efficacy or technological development, and its main value lies in prompting reflection on future technological applications.

items.title: Advances in research on the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This review discusses advances in understanding the dual roles of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke and cerebral ischemia/reperfusion injury, highlighting their potential in promoting angiogenesis and neuroprotection to reduce damage.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述关注 VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中中的作用，其对血管生成和神经保护的双重机制可能影响未来药物干预。作为物理治疗师，理解这些生物机制有助于你与神经内科医生协作，优化康复策略。
items.titleZh: VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中中作用的研究进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述讨论了 VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中和脑缺血/再灌注损伤中双重作用的理解进展，强调了它们在促进血管生成和神经保护以减少损伤方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review focuses on the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke; their dual mechanisms in angiogenesis and neuroprotection may influence future pharmaceutical interventions. As a physical therapist, understanding these biological mechanisms can help you collaborate with neurologists to optimize rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，而非原创研究，因此不提供新的临床证据或实践改变的直接建议。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, not original research, so it does not offer new clinical evidence or direct recommendations for practice changes.

items.title: Teriparatide as an Adjunct in Managing Delayed Union of Long Bone Fractures: Insights from a Tertiary Care Center
items.summary: A prospective interventional study (n=48) investigated the efficacy and safety of teriparatide as an adjunct in managing delayed union of long bone fractures (tibia, femur, humerus, radius/ulna) in adult patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性干预研究提示特立帕肽（teriparatide）可能作为辅助药物，促进长骨延迟愈合。作为物理治疗师，了解药物辅助骨愈合的进展有助于你与医生进行多学科协作，优化患者康复方案。
items.titleZh: 特立帕肽作为辅助药物管理长骨延迟愈合：来自一家三级医疗中心的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性干预研究（n=48）探讨了特立帕肽作为辅助药物在成人长骨（胫骨、股骨、肱骨、桡骨/尺骨）延迟愈合管理中的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective interventional study suggests that teriparatide may serve as an adjunct to promote delayed union of long bone fractures. As a physical therapist, understanding advancements in pharmaceutical aids for bone healing can facilitate multidisciplinary collaboration with physicians to optimize patient rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心前瞻性干预研究，样本量中等（48 例），且缺乏对照组，无法确切评估特立帕肽的独立疗效。
items.limitationEn: This study is a single-center prospective interventional study with a moderate sample size (48 patients) and lacks a control group, making it impossible to definitively assess the independent efficacy of teriparatide.

items.title: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation
items.summary: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule (TXC), a traditional Chinese medicine, is suggested to ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation, showing potential in mitigating stroke-associated pneumonia and preserving blood-brain barrier integrity.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明通腑醒神胶囊（TXC）可能通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中。尽管是中药研究，了解其潜在机制有助于你关注中西医结合康复策略的未来发展。
items.titleZh: 通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症改善缺血性卒中
items.summaryZh: 传统中药通腑醒神胶囊（TXC）被认为通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中，显示出在减轻卒中相关肺炎和保护血脑屏障完整性方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule (TXC) may ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation. Although it's a traditional Chinese medicine study, understanding its potential mechanisms can help you stay informed about future developments in integrated Western and Chinese medicine rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究的详细方法和结果未在摘要中充分披露，且为药物研究，其直接临床实践指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The detailed methods and results of this study are not fully disclosed in the abstract, and as a pharmaceutical study, its direct clinical practice guidance is limited.

items.title: A preliminary analysis of the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease: associations with motor severity and subtypes | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This preliminary analysis characterized inflammatory proteins in the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) of mid- to late-stage Parkinson's disease (PD) patients and their associations with motor severity and subtypes, recognizing neuroinflammation as a contributor to clinical progression.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步分析探讨了中晚期帕金森病患者脑脊液中炎症蛋白与运动严重程度及亚型的关联。作为临床医师，它提示你神经炎症在 PD 进展中的作用，未来可能发展出更精确的生物标志物来指导个性化康复。
items.titleZh: 中晚期帕金森病脑脊液炎症蛋白图谱的初步分析：与运动严重程度和亚型的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项初步分析描述了中晚期帕金森病（PD）患者脑脊液（CSF）中的炎症蛋白，及其与运动严重程度和亚型的关联，认识到神经炎症是临床进展的促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary analysis explores the association between inflammatory proteins in CSF and motor severity/subtypes in mid- to late-stage Parkinson's disease. As a clinician, this suggests the role of neuroinflammation in PD progression, potentially leading to more precise biomarkers for personalized rehabilitation in the future.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步分析，样本量和人群可能有限，且为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary, observational study with potentially limited sample size and population, and it cannot establish causality.

items.title: Efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting: a randomized controlled trial | BMC Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the efficacy of adjunctive remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) in improving cerebral blood flow (CBF) regulation and reducing postoperative stroke risk in patients undergoing endovascular stenting for cerebrovascular stenosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 探讨了远程缺血预处理 (RIC) 对血管内支架植入术患者脑血流调节的疗效。这提示你在围手术期康复中，可关注 RIC 这类非侵入性干预对神经保护的潜在作用，辅助改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 远程缺血预处理对血管内支架植入术患者脑血流调节的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验研究了辅助性远程缺血预处理（RIC）在接受脑血管狭窄血管内支架植入术的患者中，对改善脑血流（CBF）调节和降低术后卒中风险的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT investigates the efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients undergoing endovascular stenting. This suggests that you should consider the potential neuroprotective role of non-invasive interventions like RIC in perioperative rehabilitation to help improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 摘要未提及具体的样本量和主要结局指标，限制了对研究强度的判断。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not mention the specific sample size and primary outcome measures, limiting the assessment of the study's strength.

items.title: Serum Biomarkers in Paediatric Neurosurgery: Traumatic Brain Injury and Beyond | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This review discusses the role of serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, particularly in traumatic brain injury (TBI) and beyond, highlighting their potential for diagnosis, prognosis, and therapeutic monitoring.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了血清生物标志物在儿科神经外科（包括创伤性脑损伤）中的应用。作为物理治疗师，了解这些生物标志物的研究进展，有助于你更好地理解 TBI 等儿童神经损伤的病理生理学，并与医疗团队协作。
items.titleZh: 儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物：创伤性脑损伤及其他
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述讨论了血清生物标志物在儿科神经外科中的作用，特别是创伤性脑损伤（TBI）及其他领域，强调了它们在诊断、预后和治疗监测方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Serum biomarkers show great potential in pediatric neurosurgery, especially in the diagnosis and prognostic assessment of pediatric TBI. As a physical therapist, even if you don't directly use these markers, understanding them can help you better comprehend the extent of neurological injury and recovery potential in children, thereby optimizing your rehabilitation strategies and communicating effectively with the medical team.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注生物标志物在诊断和预后中的应用，不直接提供康复干预的证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily focusing on the application of biomarkers in diagnosis and prognosis, and does not directly provide evidence for rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in mass-start cycling sports to provide deeper insights into race incident severity beyond traditional injury incidence measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出的自行车赛事故复合严重程度评分框架，为运动康复临床医师和研究者评估和分类自行车相关事件提供了新工具。这有助于更系统地理解损伤机制和预防策略，尤其是在集体出发、高速骑行背景下。
items.titleZh: 自行车赛中与竞赛相关的事故复合严重程度评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出了一个用于集体出发自行车赛事故监测的严重程度框架，旨在提供超越传统损伤发生率测量的更深层事故严重程度洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study's proposed composite severity score framework for race-related incidents in cycling offers a new tool for sports rehabilitation clinicians and researchers to assess and classify cycling events. This will aid in a more systematic understanding of injury mechanisms and prevention strategies, particularly in mass-start, high-speed cycling contexts.
items.limitation: 本研究仅提出了一个评分框架，未进行实际验证和广泛应用评估。
items.limitationEn: This study only proposed a scoring framework, without actual validation or extensive application assessment.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) assessed safeguarding structures and readiness to respond to interpersonal violence, identifying common challenges despite high officer appointment rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲各国奥委会（NOCs）的调查揭示了运动中人际暴力保障机制的现状和差距。作为运动康复领域的从业者，你应了解这些结构性问题，并思考如何在自己的实践中更好地识别、报告和支持受害者，确保运动员的安全。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会（NOCs）的横断面调查评估了人际暴力保障结构和响应准备情况，尽管保障官员任命率高，但仍识别出常见挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) reveals the status and gaps in safeguarding structures against interpersonal violence in sports. As a practitioner in sports rehabilitation, you should understand these structural issues and consider how to better identify, report, and support victims in your practice to ensure athlete safety.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于自我报告数据，可能存在报告偏差。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey relying on self-reported data, which may introduce reporting bias.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This article discusses the need for technology, health, and performance integration in boxing to move beyond subjective judging and intuition-based training, especially concerning traumatic brain injury management.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了拳击运动中头部损伤的严重性和现有管理策略的局限性，并呼吁引入技术和数据驱动的方法。这提醒运动康复医师在拳击运动员的伤病管理和预防中应积极探索更科学、更个性化的干预手段。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 本文讨论了拳击运动中整合技术、健康与表现的必要性，以超越主观评判和基于直觉的训练，尤其是在创伤性脑损伤管理方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective highlights the severity of head injuries in boxing and the limitations of current management strategies, advocating for technology and data-driven approaches. This reminds sports rehabilitation clinicians to actively explore more scientific and personalized interventions in the injury management and prevention of boxers.
items.limitation: 本研究为一篇述评，不包含原始研究数据，仅代表作者观点。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece, not containing original research data, and represents only the authors' views.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI) whose exercise therapy was effectively facilitated by figure-of-eight taping, addressing discomfort and pain.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例报告提示，八字贴扎可能为多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）患者，尤其在康复早期，提供额外的支持，帮助其更有效地进行运动治疗。但作为单一病例，证据强度有限，不宜直接推而广之。
items.titleZh: 八字贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳一例报告
items.summaryZh: 一例病例报告描述了一名 12 岁女性空手道运动员，其多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）的运动疗法通过八字贴扎得到有效促进，改善了不适和疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report suggests that figure-of-eight taping might offer additional support for individuals with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI), particularly in early rehabilitation, facilitating more effective exercise therapy. However, as a single case, the evidence strength is limited and should not be generalized.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，证据等级低，结果外推性差。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, with low evidence level and limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over low-load exercise (LLE) in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain intensity in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions. The review included randomized clinical trials.
items.curatedReason: 低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼康复中，对改善肌力、减轻残疾和疼痛方面的额外益处已经过系统综述与荟萃分析证实。这意味着你可以考虑在常规低负荷训练中加入血流限制，以期获得更好的临床效果，尤其是在患者不耐受高负荷训练时。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比常规训练有额外益处？一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与低负荷运动（LLE）相比，低负荷血流限制运动（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌力、残疾和疼痛强度方面具有额外益处。该综述纳入了随机对照试验数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the additional benefits of low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) in musculoskeletal rehabilitation for improving muscle strength, reducing disability, and alleviating pain. You can consider incorporating BFR into conventional low-load exercise, especially when high-load training is not tolerated, to achieve superior clinical outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究的局限性在于无法明确区分 LLE-BFR 与高负荷运动 (HLE) 相比的优劣，且未详细报告各结局的具体效应量。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of this study is its inability to clearly differentiate the superiority of LLE-BFR compared to high-load exercise (HLE), and it does not explicitly report specific effect sizes for each outcome.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial demonstrated high agreement between physiotherapists, resident physicians, and senior physicians in diagnosing, treating, and discharging musculoskeletal conditions in an emergency department setting. This supports the implementation of Advanced Physiotherapy Practice roles.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊科场景中，物理治疗师（PT）与住院医师在肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断、治疗和出院决策方面与资深医师具有高度一致性。这意味着你可以利用这一证据推动高级物理治疗实践（APP）角色在急诊科的部署，减轻急诊压力并优化患者分流。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断与治疗中的一线共识：一项前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验显示，在急诊科中，物理治疗师与住院医师在肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师具有高度一致性。这支持了高级物理治疗实践（APP）角色的实施。
items.curatedReasonEn: In emergency department (ED) settings, physiotherapists (PTs) and resident physicians show high agreement with senior physicians on diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. This evidence supports advancing the deployment of Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles in EDs, which can alleviate ED pressure and optimize patient triage.
items.limitation: 本研究是在单一中心进行的小样本随机对照试验，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This study was a small-sample randomized controlled trial conducted at a single center, which may limit the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of 9 patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy was developed, encompassing functioning, psychosocial aspects, and satisfaction, suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗有了第一个核心患者报告结局（PRO）集及其测量工具（PROM）方案。新 PROMs 方案涵盖功能、心理社会和满意度三大领域。这个方案能让儿科 PTs 在日常实践、研究和质量评估中更好地评估和沟通治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了儿科物理治疗的核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs），共包含 9 项 PROs，分为功能、心理社会和满意度三个领域，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pediatric physical therapy now has its first core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs). The new PROMs cover three domains: functioning, psychosocial, and satisfaction. This framework empowers pediatric PTs to better assess and communicate treatment effectiveness in daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.limitation: 该方案的开发过程依赖于专家共识和调查，尚未经过大规模临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The development process relied on expert consensus and surveys, and has not yet undergone large-scale clinical validation.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: In 27 stroke patients, both spatial (matching step length) and temporal (matching step timing) prioritized verbal instructions significantly improved spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to no prioritization, with distinct effects on step length and timing symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 针对卒中步态不对称，空间优先（匹配步长）和时间优先（匹配步频）指令都改善了步态对称性，但影响的具体参数不同。临床中可依此微调言语指令，但别过度强调，短期试验。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者空间和时间优先言语指令对步态时空参数的影响：一项受试者内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的研究显示，与无优先指令相比，空间优先（匹配步长）和时间优先（匹配步频）的言语指令均显著改善了步态时空参数，且对步长和步态对称性有不同的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: For stroke gait asymmetry, both spatial (matching step length) and temporal (matching step timing) prioritized instructions improved gait symmetry, though affecting different parameters. Clinicians can refine verbal cues based on this, but don't overemphasize given the short-term trial.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=27），且是单一时间点的短期效应观察。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=27) and observed only short-term, single-time-point effects.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study compared the accuracy of stride count estimation across multiple wearable sensor configurations (wrists, hips, ankles) and data processing algorithms in 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults against a gold-standard instrumented treadmill across various walking speeds.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项在卒中患者和健康成年人中验证可穿戴步数追踪器准确性的重要研究。其详细的传感器配置和步行速度比较，能帮你更好地理解和选择临床步态评估工具。
items.titleZh: 多可穿戴传感器配置下步数估算对卒中后和健康成人身体活动的量化：一项验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项验证研究比较了 18 名卒中后患者和 18 名健康成人在不同步行速度下，多种可穿戴传感器配置（腕部、髋部、踝部）及数据处理算法估算步数的准确性，并与金标准仪器化跑步机进行了对比。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a crucial validation study on the accuracy of wearable step trackers in post-stroke and healthy adults. Its detailed comparison of sensor configurations and walking speeds will help you better understand and select clinical gait assessment tools.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，可能限制了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size, which may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial provides an update to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论跟进了 2018 年 IOC 关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明，概述了新的研究进展和挑战。它提供了儿科 ACL 损伤预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期护理的最新视角，能帮助你与患者和外科医生进行更深入的讨论。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿科 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理视野
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论更新了 2018 年国际奥委会关于儿科 ACL 损伤的共识声明，审视了预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期整体护理方面的最新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial follows up on the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, outlining new research advances and challenges. It provides the latest perspectives on pediatric ACL injury prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care, enabling you to engage in deeper discussions with patients and surgeons.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with prevalence estimates by searching PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus, Web of Science, and SportDiscus up to December 2024.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。它为你提供了运动员心理健康的最新证据，能帮助你筛查高风险运动员并制定预防策略。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员在不同训练水平和评估方法下饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率，并通过检索 PubMed/MEDLINE、Scopus、Web of Science 和 SportDiscus 至 2024 年 12 月，识别了与患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes and identified associated moderators. It provides you with the latest evidence on athlete mental health, helping you screen high-risk athletes and develop prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究纳入的原始研究可能存在异质性，影响荟萃分析结果的解释。
items.limitationEn: The included primary studies may have heterogeneity, affecting the interpretation of meta-analysis results.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined that admission Berg Balance Scale scores independently predict independent walking at discharge, and derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke using multivariable logistic regression.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究确定了入院时 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）评分可预测卒中患者出院时的独立行走能力，并提供了缺血性与出血性卒中的亚型特异性最佳截点值。这能帮助你更精准地进行早期预后判断和康复方案制定。
items.titleZh: 卒中住院康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截点值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 565 名卒中患者进行的多中心回顾性队列研究发现，入院时 Berg 平衡量表评分能独立预测出院时的独立行走能力，并通过多变量逻辑回归推导出了缺血性与出血性卒中的亚型特异性最佳截点值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study determined that admission Berg Balance Scale (BBS) scores independently predict independent walking at discharge for stroke patients and provided subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke. This can help you make more precise early prognostic judgments and rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性队列设计，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study was a retrospective cohort design, potentially having missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A cross-organizational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process generated recommendations for the tennis community on providing mental healthcare and promoting mental wellness among elite tennis athletes, including juniors, involving 83 participants from various governing bodies and the broader tennis ecosystem.
items.curatedReason: 这项由多组织参与的共识研究，为网球运动员（包括青少年精英）的心理健康护理和促进提供了建议。它代表了行业内对这一关键领域的最新集体智慧，指导你为运动员提供更全面的支持。
items.titleZh: 网球运动员心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程为网球界在精英网球运动员（包括青少年运动员）的心理健康护理和健康促进方面提出了建议，共有来自各管理机构和更广泛网球生态系统的 83 名参与者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-organizational consensus study provides recommendations for mental healthcare and mental wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors. It represents the latest collective wisdom in the industry on this critical area, guiding you to provide more comprehensive support for athletes.
items.limitation: Delphi 共识过程依赖专家意见，可能受专家构成和潜在偏见影响。
items.limitationEn: The Delphi consensus process relies on expert opinions, which may be influenced by expert composition and potential biases.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: This prospective observational study monitored 4450 athletes during the 14-day Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, reporting injury and illness epidemiology, including incidence (8.6 per 1000 athlete days), prevalence (10.9%), and sport-specific risks (e.g., Taekwondo 27.3).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了 2024 年巴黎残奥会的损伤和疾病流行病学数据，包括特定运动的风险。这些数据能帮助你了解残奥运动员的独特损伤模式，从而更有效地制定预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会损伤和疾病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与特定运动风险
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究在 2024 年巴黎残奥会期间监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了损伤和疾病的流行病学数据，包括发生率（每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例）、患病率（10.9%）以及特定运动风险（例如跆拳道 27.3）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides epidemiological data on injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, including sport-specific risks. This data can help you understand the unique injury patterns of Paralympic athletes, allowing for more effective prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究的监测周期仅限于赛事期间，无法评估长期损伤风险。
items.limitationEn: The study's monitoring period was limited to the Games, preventing assessment of long-term injury risks.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement
items.summary: This study aims to determine the effect of mandatory bundled payment for inpatient lower extremity joint replacement on the delivery of preoperative rehabilitation (prehabilitation).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在评估强制性捆绑式支付对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）交付的影响。这对美国的 PT 执业者非常重要，因为报销模式的改变直接影响你提供服务的方式和收入。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在确定针对住院下肢关节置换的强制性捆绑支付对术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to evaluate the impact of mandatory bundled payments on prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement. This is highly relevant for US PT practitioners, as changes in reimbursement models directly affect how you deliver services and your revenue.
items.limitation: 研究设计或方法在摘要中未详细说明，无法评估潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study design or methods were not detailed in the abstract, preventing assessment of potential biases.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: This quasi-experimental study explored the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting in Thailand, and examined preliminary language performance outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究提示音乐疗法与传统言语治疗相结合，对卒中后失语症患者具有可行性，并显示出初步积极效果。作为早期证据，它值得你关注，但还需要更强力的证据来指导常规实践。
items.titleZh: 音乐疗法整合至卒中后失语症常规言语语言康复的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 这项准实验研究探讨了在泰国门诊环境下，将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言治疗中的可行性，并考察了初步的语言表现结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study suggests the feasibility of integrating music therapy with conventional speech therapy for post-stroke aphasia, showing preliminary positive outcomes. As early evidence, it warrants your attention, but stronger evidence is needed for routine practice guidance.
items.limitation: 该研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, may be subject to selection bias.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial highlights the critical role of organizational leadership in fostering athlete mental health, advocating for proactive, systemic approaches beyond reactive crisis management, given that up to one-third of elite athletes experience mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了组织领导在促进运动员心理健康方面的重要性。它提醒你，在精英运动员康复中，除了身体健康，心理健康也需要系统性的主动干预和支持，而不仅仅是被动应对。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了组织领导力在促进运动员心理健康方面的关键作用，倡导采取积极主动的系统性方法，而非被动的危机管理，鉴于高达三分之一的精英运动员会经历心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights the importance of organizational leadership in promoting athlete mental health. It reminds you that in elite athlete rehabilitation, mental health requires systematic, proactive intervention and support, not just reactive responses, in addition to physical health.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This commentary identifies monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport as a significant challenge in ACL injury research and practice, noting that despite meeting return-to-sport criteria, athletes often experience long-term neuromuscular and sport performance impairments.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论文章指出，ACL 损伤运动员在重返运动后，监测其表现状态是一个重要挑战。它强调了即便通过了重返运动标准，运动员仍可能存在长期功能障碍，你需要更关注其重返竞技表现的长期监测和干预。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返运动后的表现状态是一项重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章指出，在 ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返运动后的表现状态是一项重大挑战，并指出尽管符合重返运动标准，运动员常会经历长期的神经肌肉和运动表现障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury is a significant challenge. It emphasizes that even after passing return-to-sport criteria, athletes may still experience long-term functional impairments, urging you to focus more on long-term monitoring and intervention for their return to performance.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including time to return-to-training, return-to-full-training, and return-to-full-performance, using Cox regression models.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究识别了运动员在病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动（RTS）结果的相关因素。它为你提供了关于不同疾病严重程度和病原体组如何影响运动员恢复时间的具体数据，指导你进行更合理的重返训练和比赛决策。
items.titleZh: 病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员重返运动结果相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 114 名病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究，通过 Cox 回归模型，识别了与重返运动（包括重返训练、重返全面训练和重返全面表现所需时间）结果相关的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study identified factors associated with return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes. It provides you with specific data on how different illness severities and pathogen groups affect athlete recovery times, guiding you to make more reasonable return-to-training and competition decisions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对有限，且结局指标主要依赖自我报告。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively limited, and outcome measures primarily rely on self-reporting.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD research explored the in vivo responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system, specifically the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, under different heat stress conditions, to understand the effects of passive heat exposure, acute heat exposure during running, and active heat acclimation.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究探索了热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响，特别是对腓肠肌-肌腱单元的响应。它能帮你理解在高温环境下运动员的生理变化，从而优化训练和康复方案。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探索了在不同热应激条件下，神经肌肉和肌肉肌腱系统（特别是腓肠肌内侧肌腱单元）的体内反应，以理解被动热暴露、跑步时急性热暴露和主动热适应的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research explored the impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics, specifically focusing on the gastrocnemius-tendon unit's response. It can help you understand physiological changes in athletes during hot environments, thereby optimizing training and rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注单一肌肉-肌腱单元（腓肠肌），外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on a single muscle-tendon unit (gastrocnemius), so generalizability may be limited.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients, focusing on its impact on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验评估了围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后的影响。如果结果为阳性，它能为你提供强有力的证据，推荐在心脏康复中早期引入呼吸肌训练。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练在老年心脏手术患者中的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly cardiac surgery patients. If positive, it will provide strong evidence for you to recommend early integration of respiratory muscle training in cardiac rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 摘要中未提供具体样本量和干预细节，影响全面评估。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide specific sample size or intervention details, affecting a comprehensive evaluation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review characterized populations and clinical contexts where the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) has been applied in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation, mapping assessment protocol heterogeneity and identifying methodological gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇关于增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中应用的范围综述。它描绘了 eGVI 的应用现状和方法学差距，帮你理解这一指标的潜力和局限性，但不直接提供临床决策。
items.titleZh: 增强型步态变异性指数在神经和老年康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描述了增强型步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中的应用人群和临床情境，绘制了评估方案的异质性，并指出了方法学上的差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a scoping review on the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. It outlines the current applications and methodological gaps of eGVI, helping you understand its potential and limitations, but does not directly guide clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，且可能遗漏非出版文献。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess study quality and may miss unpublished literature.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A correction was issued for the ACTIVATE consensus study, initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy, regarding physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals, specifically correcting Reference 57.
items.curatedReason: ACTIVATE 是由国际运动物理治疗联合会（IFSPT）发起的一项关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、处方和推广身体活动的共识研究。它提醒你 PT 在促进患者身体活动中的关键作用，但这不是新发指南，只是一个修正。
items.titleZh: 更正：ACTIVATE——国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中进行身体活动评估、处方和推广的共识研究
items.summaryZh: 国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的 ACTIVATE 共识研究发布了一项更正，涉及医疗专业人员在临床实践中进行身体活动评估、处方和推广，具体修正了参考文献 57。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACTIVATE is a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy (IFSPT) on physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals. It reminds you of the crucial role of PTs in promoting patient physical activity, but this is a correction, not a new guideline.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on athletes' mental health, highlighting both the risks and opportunities, particularly for young athletes, and suggesting directions for future research and practice.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响，包括风险和机遇。它提醒你在康复过程中，要考虑运动员的数字社交环境对其身心发展的影响，尤其是在青少年群体中。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的两面影响，尤其强调了对年轻运动员的风险与机遇，并提出了未来研究和实践的方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial explores the impact of social media on athlete mental health, including both risks and opportunities. It reminds you to consider the influence of athletes' digital social environments on their physical and mental development during rehabilitation, especially among adolescents.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey across five pre-competition medical centers in Cameroon assessed the knowledge, attitudes, and practices of professional football stakeholders regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项在喀麦隆足球界进行的横断面调查评估了心源性猝死（SCA）的准备情况。它揭示了低资源运动环境中 SCA 应对系统的差距，提醒你即便在资源有限的地区，PT 也有责任推动紧急预案的改进。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球心源性猝死准备情况：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆五个赛前医疗中心进行的横断面调查评估了职业足球利益相关者对心源性猝死的知识、态度和实践，识别了低资源体育环境中心源性猝死准备工作的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional survey in Cameroonian football assessed sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness. It reveals gaps in SCA response systems in low-resource sports environments, reminding you that PTs have a responsibility to advocate for improvements in emergency preparedness, even in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面调查，无法评估干预措施的有效性或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, it cannot assess the effectiveness of interventions or causality.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic highlights the importance of video analysis for understanding qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport, crucial for developing effective injury prevention and rehabilitation strategies, given the complexity of muscle injury etiology.
items.curatedReason: 这张信息图强调了通过视频分析来理解运动中肌肉拉伤的定性与定量情境特征的重要性。它提醒你，在制定预防和康复策略时，应利用视频分析工具深入理解损伤机制。
items.titleZh: 信息图。运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌群的定性与定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这张信息图强调了视频分析在理解运动中肌肉拉伤的定性与定量情境特征方面的重要性，鉴于肌肉损伤病因的复杂性，这对制定有效的损伤预防和康复策略至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic highlights the importance of video analysis for understanding qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sports. It reminds you to use video analysis tools to gain a deeper understanding of injury mechanisms when developing prevention and rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia, assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals from April to May 2025, using a structured questionnaire and medical record review.
items.curatedReason: 这项埃塞俄比亚的横断面研究提供了卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及其相关因素的区域数据。它有助于你了解不同地域的康复资源可及性，但结论不直接适用于美国或中国市场。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚贡德尔镇卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用及其相关因素研究
items.summaryZh: 这项在埃塞俄比亚贡德尔镇进行的横断面研究，通过结构化问卷和病历回顾，评估了 2025 年 4 月至 5 月期间卒中幸存者就诊医院的物理治疗服务利用情况及相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study from Ethiopia provides regional data on physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors. It helps you understand rehabilitation resource accessibility in different geographies, but its conclusions are not directly applicable to the US or Chinese markets.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality.

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device, Hand Stretcher®, significantly improved flexor spasticity and increased wrist range of motion in chronic stroke patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity over 8 weeks compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 新型动态腕手牵伸装置有望改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛。这项小型 RCT 提示，对于轻中度痉挛的患者，该装置可有效降低 MAS 评分和提高 ROM，为传统手动牵伸提供了辅助方案。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸装置改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项试点随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验（n=30）发现，与对照组相比，Hand Stretcher® 动态腕手牵伸装置在 8 周内显著改善了慢性卒中轻中度痉挛患者的屈肌痉挛并增加了腕关节活动度。
items.curatedReasonEn: A novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows promise in improving flexor spasticity in chronic stroke patients. This small RCT suggests that for patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity, the device effectively reduces MAS scores and increases ROM, offering an adjunctive option to traditional manual stretching.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的试点研究，样本量较小，长期疗效和更广泛人群的适用性尚待大型 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary pilot study with a small sample size; long-term efficacy and applicability to a broader population require validation through larger RCTs.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease, identifying stimulation site, coil type, and stimulation frequency as key modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: 这篇荟萃分析再次确认了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能的短期改善作用。刺激部位（如运动皮层）和高频刺激是关键调节因素，临床实践中可作为优化 rTMS 方案的参考。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能疗效及调节因素的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病患者运动功能的短期和长期治疗效果，并确定了刺激部位、线圈类型和刺激频率是关键的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reconfirms the short-term motor function improvement of rTMS in Parkinson's disease. Stimulation site (e.g., motor cortex) and high-frequency stimulation are key modulating factors that can guide optimization of rTMS protocols in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且主要评估短期效应，长期疗效和不同 rTMS 方案的最佳组合仍需更多高质量研究。
items.limitationEn: The included studies in this meta-analysis may have high heterogeneity, and mainly evaluated short-term effects; long-term efficacy and optimal combinations of different rTMS protocols still require more high-quality research.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review established weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury by analyzing studies from PubMed, Sportdiscuss, WOS, and Scielo databases, aiming to address the high recurrence rate due to lack of consensus.
items.curatedReason: 膕绳肌损伤后的重返运动标准缺乏共识，导致高复发率。这篇系统综述试图建立加权标准，作为临床指导，你可以在制定或调整重返运动方案时参考其中的证据质量分析，以降低患者再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述通过分析 PubMed、Sportdiscuss、WOS 和 Scielo 数据库的研究，建立了膕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，旨在解决因缺乏共识导致的高复发率问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Lack of consensus on return-to-play criteria after hamstring injury contributes to high recurrence rates. This systematic review aims to establish weighted criteria as clinical guidance. You can refer to its evidence quality analysis when developing or adjusting return-to-play protocols to reduce patient re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 本系统综述发现现有研究方法学质量差异大，且缺乏统一的重返运动标准，提示仍需更多高质量研究来确立最佳实践。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review found significant heterogeneity in methodological quality among existing studies and a lack of unified return-to-play criteria, indicating a need for more high-quality research to establish best practices.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the expectations and experiences of hip or knee osteoarthritis patients regarding physical therapist-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, finding that while care quality was perceived as good, patient participation in decision-making and fulfillment of assessment expectations were lower.
items.curatedReason: 骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导的分诊（PT-led triage）期望值高，但对决策参与度和评估满足度较低。这意味着即便 PT 主导分诊能提高就诊可及性，患者体验设计也需优化，不能只关注诊疗结果。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中，膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。研究发现，虽然患者认为护理质量良好，但他们在决策参与度和评估期望满足度方面较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with OA have high expectations for PT-led triage, but report lower satisfaction with decision-making participation and assessment fulfillment. This suggests that while PT-led triage improves access, patient experience design needs optimization beyond just clinical outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究采用探索性定性设计，样本量小，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study used an exploratory qualitative design with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (N=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6-min walk test distance) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity at 6 months compared to usual care in individuals with TIA or mild stroke.
items.curatedReason: 针对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复项目，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力和身体活动水平。将心血管康复纳入 TIA 和轻度卒中患者的常规管理方案，可作为一项核心推荐。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（N=140）发现，对于短暂性脑缺血发作或轻度卒中患者，为期 6 周的心血管康复项目在 6 个月时显著改善了功能性运动能力（6 分钟步行距离）和中高强度身体活动，优于常规护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation programs for individuals with transient ischaemic attack (TIA) or mild stroke significantly improve functional exercise capacity and physical activity over 6 months. Incorporating cardiovascular rehabilitation into routine management for TIA and mild stroke patients should be a core recommendation.
items.limitation: 研究排除了有严重合并症或沟通障碍的患者，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study excluded patients with severe comorbidities or communication difficulties, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated stroke survivors discharged to IRFs vs. SNFs from a US healthcare payer perspective, finding IRFs to be more cost-effective over 90 days despite higher initial costs, due to lower mortality and disability and higher community discharge rates.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方角度看，卒中后急性期康复，入住住院康复机构（IRF）比技能护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益，虽然初始成本更高，但能带来更好的临床结果。在为卒中患者推荐转诊机构时，优先考虑 IRF，并向支付方强调其长期效益。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方角度看卒中急性期后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构与技能护理机构的比较
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医疗支付方角度评估了卒中幸存者出院后入住住院康复机构（IRF）与技能护理机构（SNF）的成本效益，发现 IRF 尽管初始成本较高，但在 90 天内更具成本效益，因其死亡率和残疾率较低，社区出院率较高。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a US healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation at Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than at Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs), despite higher initial costs, due to superior clinical outcomes. When recommending referrals for stroke patients, prioritize IRFs and emphasize their long-term benefits to payers.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a decision analytic model for simulation, and the results depend on the accuracy of the model parameters.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This quasi-experimental study (N=72) demonstrated that a 12-week exergaming intervention using Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure significantly improved physical, psychological (e.g., depression, cognitive function), and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 在机构养老的老年肌少症患者中，12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能同时改善其身体、心理和社交功能。你可以在养老机构积极推广体感游戏，作为综合肌少症管理方案的一部分。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 这项准实验研究（N=72）表明，在机构养老的肌少症老年人中，使用 Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure 进行的 12 周体感游戏干预显著改善了身体、心理（如抑郁、认知功能）和社交结局，优于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention simultaneously improves physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. You can actively promote exergaming in long-term care facilities as part of a comprehensive sarcopenia management program.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: This correspondence highlights the WHO's global rehabilitation indicators and urges a shift in focus from device-centric investment to human resources and sustainable development to ensure rehabilitation access for all.
items.curatedReason: 世界卫生组织（WHO）的全球康复指标强调康复是医疗保健不可或缺的一部分，而不仅仅是辅助项目。在倡导康复时，你应该将关注点从单纯的设备投资转向人才培养和可持续发展，以确保康复服务的可及性。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯强调了世卫组织的全球康复指标，并敦促将重点从以设备为中心的投资转向人力资源和可持续发展，以确保所有人都能获得康复服务。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WHO's global rehabilitation indicators emphasize rehabilitation as an integral part of healthcare, not merely an add-on. When advocating for rehabilitation, you should shift focus from solely investing in devices to developing human resources and ensuring sustainable access to rehabilitation services.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that lower physical activity levels were significantly associated with worse functional capacity, more musculoskeletal symptoms, and higher perceived barriers. Individuals with low physical activity had greater functional limitations and symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、功能受限和疲劳与身体活动水平呈负相关。在临床实践中，你需要全面评估这些共病因素，并制定个体化的干预策略来提高患者的身体活动水平。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，较低的身体活动水平与较差的功能能力、更多的肌肉骨骼症状以及更高的感知障碍显著相关。身体活动水平低的个体有更大的功能限制和症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, functional limitations, and fatigue are negatively associated with physical activity levels in women with obesity. In clinical practice, you need to comprehensively assess these comorbidities and develop individualized intervention strategies to improve patients' physical activity.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且依赖自我报告的身体活动问卷。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and relies on self-reported physical activity questionnaires.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study in 45 stroke survivors confirmed that the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach is feasible within a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation setting, showing high fidelity and perceived value from participants.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中对卒中幸存者的应用是可行的，并表现出积极的效果，值得你进一步探索将其整合到神经康复实践中。
items.titleZh: 在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用日常职业表现认知导向（CO-OP）方法的可行性
items.summaryZh: 这项对 45 名卒中幸存者的可行性研究证实，日常职业表现认知导向（CO-OP）方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中是可行的，并显示出高依从性和参与者的良好感知价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: The application of the CO-OP approach for stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context is feasible and shows positive effects. You should further explore integrating it into your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为单组前测-后测设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的明确疗效。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-group pretest-posttest design without a control group, which limits the ability to definitively assess intervention efficacy.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 1286 SCI individuals in inpatient rehabilitation found higher admission systolic and diastolic BP associated with higher BMI, lower neurological lesion level, and motor incomplete SCI. Clinically meaningful BP changes were determined by demographic and injury characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间的血压和心率变化及其决定因素值得关注。对于你日常管理 SCI 患者时，应持续监测血压，尤其留意体重指数、神经损伤水平和药物等因素对血压的影响。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间的血压水平和临床意义变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解
items.summaryZh: 这项对 1286 名脊髓损伤住院康复患者的回顾性队列研究发现，入院时较高的收缩压和舒张压与较高的体重指数、较低的神经损伤水平以及运动不完全性脊髓损伤相关。血压的临床意义变化由人口学和损伤特征决定。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure and heart rate changes and their determinants during inpatient rehabilitation for spinal cord injury patients warrant attention. In your daily management of SCI patients, continuously monitor blood pressure, especially considering the influence of BMI, neurological lesion level, and medication.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective highlights the growing prevalence of hip OA in young adults and emphasizes the importance of early diagnosis and intervention to potentially alter its trajectory, drawing parallels with efforts in knee OA.
items.curatedReason: 早期诊断和干预髋骨关节炎（OA）至关重要。你需要提高对年轻患者早期髋关节 OA 的识别和治疗意识，以便及时进行干预，改变疾病进程，这在临床实践中往往被忽视。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋骨关节炎：一个干预的窗口期
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章强调了髋骨关节炎在年轻成人中日益增长的流行率，并强调了早期诊断和干预的重要性，以期改变其疾病进程，同时与膝骨关节炎的干预措施进行对比。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early diagnosis and intervention for hip osteoarthritis (OA) are crucial. You need to increase awareness of identifying and treating early-stage hip OA in younger adults to intervene promptly and alter the disease trajectory, which is often overlooked in clinical practice.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated the changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries, aiming to enhance the understanding of healthy aging and inform strategies for improving intrinsic capacity in diverse populations.
items.curatedReason: 内在能力（intrinsic capacity）是促进健康老龄化的关键目标。你应关注各国内在能力的变化趋势，这将帮助你了解特定人群的老龄化健康状况，并调整康复策略以提高患者的内在能力。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家的证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家内在能力的变化和时间趋势，旨在增进对健康老龄化的理解，并为改善不同人群内在能力的策略提供信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intrinsic capacity is a key goal in promoting healthy aging. You should pay attention to trends in intrinsic capacity across countries, as this will help you understand the health status of aging populations and adapt rehabilitation strategies to improve patients' intrinsic capacity.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: This cross-sectional study compared the prevalence of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury versus a matched control cohort, identifying sociodemographic determinants.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤（SCI）患者食物不安全的流行率及其与 BMI 的关联值得关注。你在评估 SCI 患者时，需要考虑社会经济因素，识别食物不安全风险，并转诊至相关社会服务以解决患者的营养和健康问题。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者食物不安全的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联：来自“我们所有人研究项目”的横断面分析
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究比较了脊髓损伤患者与匹配的无残疾对照组食物不安全的流行率及其与 BMI 的关联，并确定了社会人口学决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The prevalence of food insecurity in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) and its association with BMI warrant attention. When assessing SCI patients, you need to consider socioeconomic factors, identify food insecurity risks, and refer to relevant social services to address patients' nutritional and health issues.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立食物不安全与 BMI 之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional analysis cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This study examines the correlates of loneliness in persons with spinal cord injury, highlighting that mobility impairments can exacerbate feelings of isolation and contribute to loneliness.
items.curatedReason: 孤独感在脊髓损伤（SCI）患者中可能更为普遍，并影响其康复。你在评估和制定康复计划时，除了生理功能，也应积极筛查患者的心理社会需求，并提供支持来减少孤独感。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的关联因素，强调行动障碍可能加剧隔离感并导致孤独。
items.curatedReasonEn: Loneliness may be more prevalent in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) and can affect their rehabilitation. When assessing and developing rehabilitation plans, you should actively screen for patients' psychosocial needs in addition to physiological function and provide support to reduce loneliness.
items.limitation: 本研究标题未提供具体研究设计和样本量，可能无法充分评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The title of this study does not provide specific study design and sample size, which may limit the assessment of evidence strength.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
